creator: newton.ja.terry@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 220523
svn diff for deskutils/calcurse: update to 4.7.0

Changes Makefile:

- moved USES to earlier position in the order of variables

- passes portlint -A
- port builds (package) fine on 12.1-, 12.2-RELEASE (can't check testport in 
  poudriere, no setup available at the moment)
- package works fine on amd64 12.1 and 12.2

Best regards, N.T.
